⚡ Single trigger: fires full alert at severity HIGH+ regardless of composite score. FDRI = KC_01×0.25 + KC_02×0.20 + KC_03×0.25 + KC_04×0.15 + KC_05×0.15

US Stock Impact | Baseline FDRI 0.3500 WATCH
INVERSE LOGIC ALERT: TLT, TMF, and UUP carry inverse price mechanics. When yields spike (FDRI crisis), TLT and TMF prices FALL (bond price inversely proportional to yield). UUP is BULLISH on yield carry but INVERSE BEARISH on sustained dollar erosion. GLD is the primary flight-to-quality recipient.
StockTickerLogicPrimary ChannelDirection on FDRI SpikeNote
iShares 20Y TreasuryTLT ⚡ INVERSE BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS Bond price falls as yield rises — KC_01 = TLT bear signal
Direxion 3x Bull 20YTMF ⚡ INVERSE BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS 3x 3x leveraged — yield spike = catastrophic drawdown
SPDR Gold TrustGLD BULLISH dollar_erosion + fiscal_trajectory ↑ RISES Flight-to-quality on fiscal stress; dollar erosion amplifies
VanEck Gold MinersGDX BULLISH dollar_erosion + fiscal_trajectory ↑ RISES Leveraged gold proxy — amplifies GLD direction
JPMorgan ChaseJPM BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS NIM compression from flat/inverted curve under rate stress
Bank of AmericaBAC BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS Largest unrealised bond portfolio losses on yield spike
Vanguard Real Estate ETFVNQ BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS Rate-sensitive real estate — cap rate expansion on yield spike
SPDR S&P HomebuildersXHB BEARISH yield_spike_channel ↓ FALLS Mortgage rate surge crushes affordability + new home demand
iShares EM BondsEMB BEARISH yield_spike + dollar_erosion ↔ MIXED BEARISH on dollar stress; BULLISH only if dollar erodes (rare combo)
Invesco DB USD BullishUUP ⚡ DUAL-LOGIC yield_spike (carry) / dollar_erosion ↔ CHANNEL-DEPENDENT BULLISH on yield carry; INVERSE BEARISH on sustained erosion
The TLT/TMF Inverse Trap: Many investors buy TLT as a "safe haven" during fiscal stress — this is wrong in an FDRI spike scenario. When the US fiscal crisis is driven by yield normalization (not deflation), TLT falls with equities simultaneously. The only true safe haven in this domain is GLD. Monitor TLT vs GLD relative performance as a real-time FDRI proxy.
Q3 2026 Outlook — Fiscal Signal Calendar
Three conditions that would escalate FDRI from WATCH to ELEVATED:
🔴 10Y yield sustains above 5.0% for >2 weeks (pre-KC_01 warning zone)
🔴 Treasury refunding auction BTC falls below 2.2x (KC_03 approach)
🔴 CBO mid-year budget update revises debt/GDP trajectory upward
Any single condition crossing → FDRI trajectory shift to ELEVATED zone.

Key FDRI Insight — The Structural Ceiling on US Risk Asset Multiples:
The Federal Debt canary does not signal an imminent crisis — it signals the structural ceiling on US equity valuations. Every 50bps increase in the 10Y risk-free rate compresses the theoretical P/E multiple by ~2–3x. At 5.5% (KC_01), the theoretical fair-value S&P 500 P/E falls from ~21x to ~16x. FDRI is the macro governor of the entire US risk-asset complex.

Supply Chain Risk Intelligence
Chokepoint · Freight Rate · Critical Minerals · Nearshoring · Logistics
SCRI  0.3000  WATCH

US Federal Debt & Treasury Market Monitor operates an advanced, deeply integrated supply chain network with deep logistics infrastructure, multiple port redundancies, and sophisticated inventory management — reducing but not eliminating chokepoint sensitivity. Maritime chokepoint exposure is concentrated across: Us Treasury Market (critical dependency, weight 1.00); Federal Reserve Bsr (high dependency, weight 0.60).

Critical import dependencies include foreign capital flows, fed qt absorption.

Primary exports — treasury bonds, usd reserve currency — are sensitive to global freight rate movements and trade route disruptions.

SCRI 0.3000 WATCH — Structural supply chain sensitivity is elevated. Chokepoint and critical import dependencies warrant close monitoring. A single trigger event (Strait closure, export ban, major port strike) could escalate to ELEVATED within days.

Watch signals: Us Treasury Market closure or capacity restriction → immediate freight rate spike  |  SCFI/WCI/BDI freight index spike above 2-standard-deviation threshold → freight stress trigger

Real Estate Risk Intelligence
Property Price · Mortgage Stress · Commercial RE · Developer Debt · REIT
RERI  0.1000  NORMAL

US Federal Debt & Treasury Market Monitor is classified as a advanced developed-market real estate market. Primary stress vector is fiscal sustainability and sovereign debt market stability. Commercial real estate exposure is moderate CRE exposure with manageable vacancy pressures.

As an advanced developed-market sovereign, USA property and capital markets are the deepest and most liquid in the world. Real estate stress manifests primarily through rate-sensitive mortgage markets, commercial real estate vacancy cycles, and sovereign debt dynamics that affect the cost of capital across all asset classes. The primary RERI risk vector here is not classical property collapse but fiscal-monetary feedback loops that reprice collateral values system-wide.

No active developer stress flagged. Property developers in USA are not currently assessed as in distress at a systemic level.

RERI 0.1000 NORMAL — Property market stable at structural baseline. No systemic stress indicators active.

Watch signals: Property price index 3-month decline exceeding 2% → KC_RE01 trigger

Insurance Risk Intelligence
Natural Catastrophe · Reinsurance · Property Withdrawal · Financial Guaranty · Climate
INRI  0.0400  NORMAL

No primary natural catastrophe perils identified in the structural config for USA.

The insurance market in USA is deep and liquid, with well-capitalised domestic insurers and active reinsurance participation. Reinsurance profile: low reinsurance dependency — domestic capacity absorbs most shock.

Climate risk classification: Tier 0. Limited near-term climate-driven insurance market disruption expected at current trajectory.

INRI 0.0400 NORMAL — Insurance market operating within baseline parameters. No structural stress active.

Watch signals: Cat bond spread widening → forward signal of reinsurance market stress
